risk_rationale: The Kids Online Safety Act introduces new requirements for age-tailored safeguards and prohibits advertising illegal products to minors, which may not be fully addressed by TikTok's current baseline policies.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: TikTok states personalized ads are not allowed for under-18 users.
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Prohibits advertising of illegal products to minors.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: While TikTok does not allow personalized ads for minors, the baseline does not explicitly address the prohibition of advertising illegal products to minors.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Parent can view selected teen settings (e.g., downloads, likes visibility, topic preferences).
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Requires platforms to provide safeguards and parental controls tailored to minors' ages and developmental needs.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: Current parental controls may not be sufficiently tailored to minors' developmental needs as required by the new regulation.

remediations.title: Enhance Parental Controls
remediations.description: Develop and implement more granular parental controls that are tailored to the developmental needs of minors, including age-specific settings and content restrictions.
acceptance_criteria: Content restrictions are adjustable based on developmental stages.

remediations.title: Prohibit Advertising of Illegal Products to Minors
remediations.description: Implement a system to ensure that no advertisements for illegal products are shown to minors, regardless of personalization settings.
acceptance_criteria: System in place to block ads for illegal products to minors.
Regular audits to ensure compliance with the prohibition.

business_impact: Failure to comply with the Kids Online Safety Act could result in significant legal penalties and damage to brand reputation in the US market.
recommended_actions: Conduct a detailed review of current parental controls and ad policies.
Develop a compliance roadmap to address identified gaps.
Engage with legal and policy teams to ensure alignment with the new legislative requirements.
